items.label: Hello World (Linux x86)
items.code:
section .data
msg db 'Hello, World!',0Ah
section .text
global _start
_start:
 mov eax,4
 mov ebx,1
 mov ecx,msg
 mov ebx,13
 int 0x80
 mov eax,1
 xor ebx,ebx
 int 0x80

items.label: FlatList
TouchableOpacity
items.code:
import { TouchableOpacity, Text } from "react-native";

<TouchableOpacity onPress={() => console.log("Pressed")}>
  <Text>Button</Text>
</TouchableOpacity>

items.label: Platform check
items.code:
import { Platform } from "react-native";

const margin = Platform.OS === "ios" ? 20 : 10;

const { width, height } = Dimensions.get("window");

items.label: SafeAreaView
items.code:
import { SafeAreaView } from "react-native";

<SafeAreaView style={{ flex: 1 }}>
  <Text>Inside Safe Area</Text>
</SafeAreaView>
items.desc: Renders content within the safe area boundaries of a device.
